name: Linda Thompson
description:
'''Linda Thompson''' ({{Nee| '''Pettifer'''}}, later '''Peters'''; born 23 August 1947) is a British singer-songwriter.

Thompson featured in the [[British folk rock]] movement of the 1970s and 1980s, in collaboration with guitarist [[Richard Thompson (musician)|Richard Thompson]], to whom she was married for ten years, and later as a solo artist.
